creator: Mark.Martinec@ijs.si
text:
In my case the INNOBASE is off:
  INNOBASE=off: Build InnoDB engine next to XtraDB
and mariadb101-server-10.1.26_3 still failed to build under poudriere,
so the title of this PR may be misleading.

Building packages again today: seems the problem went away with
the today's update of ports (no changes in the mariadb101-server port
or in our build environment, just ports update).
Don't see how, but thanks anyway!

So as far as I'm concerned this has been fixed.
